widgetData.source_sentence: Head down the block and stop in front of G Lounge on the right.
sentences: Make an immediate left turn at the intersection.
After passing two intersections, you will reach a stoplight.
Continue down the road and you'll find G Lounge on your right side.

widgetData.source_sentence: Go through the light with Starbucks and T-Mobile and at the next light with CVS, turn right.
sentences: Continue past the traffic light featuring Starbucks and T-Mobile, then turn right at the subsequent light with a CVS.
Proceed towards the traffic light and take a right turn.
When you reach the third light, make a left turn.

widgetData.source_sentence: Pass the parking lot on the left and then turn right. Go straight until you pass a fire station on the right, then cross the street. Stop just after Social Lounge on the left.
sentences: Pull over nearly halfway down the street adjacent to More Parlour on the left, just before Meow Parlour.
Drive past the parking lot to your left, take a right turn, head straight until you see a fire station on your right, cross over, and stop just after you pass Social Lounge to your left.
Turn right after passing the gas station on your left, continue straight past the police station on your right, and stop at the coffee shop on your left.
Proceed straight to the traffic light and make a left turn.
The corner features a local bakery instead of a Starbucks.
On the corner, there is a Starbucks.

widgetData.source_sentence: Keep going past the trio of banks at the intersection.
sentences: Continue straight past the three banks where the roads meet.
Go past the garden to your right, then make a left turn.
Turn left at the trio of banks instead of continuing straight.
